message:
feat(trace): emit runtime trace events from channel, timer, scheduler, and cancellation subsystems

Wire asx_trace_emit calls into concrete implementations so that every
task state transition, scheduler round, channel send/recv, timer
set/cancel/fire, obligation abort, and region close is recorded in the
global trace ring buffer.

Key changes:
- trace.h: update docs — trace is no longer auto-reset by scheduler_run;
  callers must call asx_trace_reset() explicitly.
- mpsc.c: emit CHANNEL_SEND on permit send and CHANNEL_RECV on try_recv.
- cancellation.c: emit TASK_TRANSITION on every state change during
  cancel, checkpoint, and finalize paths.
- lifecycle.c: emit OBLIGATION_ABORT on obligation abort.
- parallel.c: emit SCHED_ROUND per iteration and TASK_TRANSITION on all
  state changes in the parallel scheduler.
- scheduler.c: emit SCHED_ROUND per iteration and TASK_TRANSITION on all
  state changes in the cooperative scheduler.
- quiescence.c: emit REGION_CLOSED when a region finishes draining.
- timer_wheel.c: emit TIMER_SET, TIMER_CANCEL, and TIMER_FIRE events.
- tests: add tests covering the new trace events in test_mpsc,
  test_scheduler, and test_trace (obligation abort, region closed,
  task transitions, channel events, timer events).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
